_meta.description: Universal, all-brands product category mapping for Drywall Toolbox. Canonical functional categories resolve to brand-specific WooCommerce taxonomy paths and Columbia scraper family names. This is the single source of truth for category assignment across all catalog tooling, import scripts, and frontend navigation.

universal_categories.label: Automatic Tapers
universal_categories.description: Fully automatic taping tools that simultaneously apply, tape, and embed joint compound in a single pass. The highest-efficiency category in production drywall finishing.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Automatic Taping Tools
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Automatic Taping Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Automatic Taping Tools
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Automatic Taping Tools

universal_categories.label: Semi-Automatic Tapers
universal_categories.description: Semi-automatic taping tools that apply tape and compound simultaneously but require manual feeding. A cost-effective alternative to full automatic tapers for smaller crews.

brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Semi-Automatic Taping Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Semi-Automatic Taping Tools

universal_categories.label: Finishing Boxes
universal_categories.description: Automatic flat boxes (mud boxes) that dispense and feather joint compound over flat and butt joints in a single pass. Available in 5.5" through 14" widths for every coat stage.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Flat Boxes
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Flat Boxes
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Flat Boxes
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Flat Boxes

universal_categories.label: Handles
universal_categories.description: Extension and flat box handles that attach to finishing boxes, corner tools, and applicators. Includes fixed-length, twist-lock, extendible, and specialty matrix-style handles.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Handles & Extensions
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Handles & Extensions
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Handles & Extensions
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Handles & Extensions

universal_categories.label: Corner Tools
universal_categories.description: All tools used to apply, roll, and finish joint compound at inside and outside drywall corners. Parent category encompassing corner flushers, corner rollers, angle heads, applicators, and compound tubes.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Tools

universal_categories.label: Corner Rollers
universal_categories.description: Cylindrical rolling tools for embedding and pressing joint tape into inside and outside drywall corners. Includes inside, outside, bullnose, wide, and European profile rollers.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Tools

universal_categories.label: Corner Flushers
universal_categories.description: Finishing tools that wipe and feather joint compound on both sides of inside drywall corners in a single pass. Includes standard, direct, and combo flusher styles.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Tools

universal_categories.label: Angleheads
universal_categories.description: Precision corner finishing tools that feather joint compound across both sides of internal corners simultaneously. Used after the rolling stage to produce a paint-ready surface.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Tools

universal_categories.label: Applicators
universal_categories.description: Tools that apply joint compound directly to inside and outside corners. Includes flat, inside corner, external corner, and two-way internal corner applicators.

brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Tools

universal_categories.label: Compound Tubes
universal_categories.description: Cylindrical mud-holding tubes that attach to corner tools and applicators to supply joint compound during finishing. Available in standard and cam-lock styles across multiple lengths.

brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Corner Tools

universal_categories.label: Pumps
universal_categories.description: Mud pumps, box fillers, and goosenecks used to load joint compound into automatic taping tools and finishing boxes. Includes standard, tall boy, and powered pump variants.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Mud Pans & Pumps
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Mud Pans & Pumps
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Mud Pans & Pumps
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Mud Pans & Pumps

universal_categories.label: Nailspotters
universal_categories.description: Specialized tools for applying a precise spot of joint compound over nail and screw heads in drywall. Available in 2" and 3" sizes.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Nail Spotters
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Corner Tools
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Nail Spotters
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Nail Spotters

_notes.Columbia: Columbia nailspotters map to Corner Tools in the WC taxonomy. Evaluate migrating to a dedicated Nail Spotters path in a future catalog revision.

universal_categories.label: Smoothing Blades
universal_categories.description: Replaceable flexible steel blades used with flat box handles to skim and smooth joint compound. Available in multiple widths (7"–48") and profiles including Fat Boy, Sabre, and Tomahawk series.

brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Knives & Blades
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Knives & Blades

universal_categories.label: Toolsets
universal_categories.description: Curated bundles and kits containing multiple complementary drywall finishing tools sold together at a package price. Ideal for outfitting new crews or upgrading complete tool systems.

brand_wc_paths.Asgard: Drywall Finishing Tools > Asgard > Tool Sets & Kits
brand_wc_paths.Columbia: Drywall Finishing Tools > Columbia > Tool Sets & Kits
brand_wc_paths.Platinum Drywall Tools: Drywall Finishing Tools > Platinum Drywall Tools > Tool Sets & Kits
brand_wc_paths.TapeTech: Drywall Finishing Tools > TapeTech > Tool Sets & Kits

brand_coverage_matrix._description: Which canonical category IDs each brand maps to. Use this to validate catalog completeness and surface missing product lines.

wc_path_to_canonical._description: Reverse index. Given a WooCommerce category path, returns the canonical category ID. Used by import scripts to normalize incoming data.
